items.title: Researchers Tested 81 Popular Headphones for Toxic Chemicals. Every Single One Tested Positive
items.description: The study detected hormone-disrupting plastics in nearly every pair.

items.title: Amazon Created a Huge Hiring Mess That Other Companies Will Pay For
items.description: The over-scrutinizing of job candidates has reached new levels of stupid.
